goal: Close the M6 acceptance-test gap for exported adapter loading by adding focused tests that fail if the exported runtime depends on MIB_RUNTIME_ALLOW_FAKE_BACKEND by default, returns hardcoded routes without invoking the adapter object, or allows metadata-only Transformers/MLX adapters to infer without loaded backend objects. This gate strengthens M6 verification only; it does not provide a real trained adapter, does not run no-fake Docker endpoint transcripts, and must preserve M6-RC NOT_GO.
head: 9f86de1
blocked_scope: Product behavior changes outside exported runtime adapter-load safeguards
Training, UI, schema, script, DB, API, or worker changes
Changing toolchain expectations or weakening bootstrap/export checks
Creating or committing model weights or adapter artifacts
M6-RC GO/sign-off changes before real adapter endpoint evidence or release-policy decision
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may add focused M6 exported adapter-load tests and only patch runtime loader/entrypoint code if required for those tests. It must not create real adapter artifacts or claim M6-RC GO.
required_evidence: Tests prove exported runtime invokes the adapter object's infer method for native and OpenAI routes
Tests prove Transformers and MLX metadata-only adapters fail without backend objects
Focused export runtime smoke/parity tests still pass
Explicit note that M6-RC remains NOT_GO for real adapter endpoint evidence
warnings: Current host still exposes no CUDA device: nvidia-smi is unavailable and torch.cuda.is_available() is false.
Current repo/tmp artifact search found fixture-sized adapter files only.
This gate strengthens tests but cannot produce real trained adapter endpoint evidence.
M6-RC remains NOT_GO until real trained adapter endpoint evidence exists or release policy explicitly accepts fixture-adapter evidence.

phase_notes.plan: Open scoped contract to close the missing M6 exported adapter load acceptance test.
phase_notes.audit: Read SSOT M6 criteria, implementation guide M6-001/M6-002, current runtime loaders, runtime entrypoint, existing export tests, and existing real-adapter evidence. Confirmed current environment still lacks visible CUDA and real trained adapter artifacts.
phase_notes.build: Add focused tests for fake-backend opt-in, runtime adapter invocation, and metadata-only loader failure.
phase_notes.check: Contract JSON validation, exported adapter-load guard tests, exported runtime smoke/parity tests, git diff --check, and git diff --cached --check passed.
phase_notes.done: Evidence recorded in artifacts/review/exported_adapter_load_guard_evidence.md and docs/WORKING.md. Exported adapter-load guard is GO as test coverage only; M6-RC remains NOT_GO until real trained adapter endpoint evidence exists or release policy explicitly accepts fixture-adapter evidence.

pabcd.approved_scope: Focused M6 exported adapter-load tests, minimal runtime-loader fix if necessary, evidence, and operational handoff.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No training/UI/schema/API/DB changes, no model/adapter artifacts in git, no release GO changes.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
